response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified the first song as 'アイライフ' (i-Life) based on the lyrics 'アイツを愛す覚悟が'. Searches for this song did not return reliable official lyrics, so lyrics are set to null. 2. Identified the second song as '怪獣の花唄' (Kaiju no Hanauta) by Vaundy from the on-screen text. 3. Used the search query '\"怪獣の花唄\" Vaundy Japanese and English lyrics' to successfully retrieve the lyrics for the second song. 4. Segmented the video into two song scenes and one transition scene.
response.global_summary: A 2-song karaoke performance by four Hololive members (Natsuiro Matsuri, Shishiro Botan, Shiranui Flare, and another member) in a virtual karaoke room.

scenes.description: The group performs the first song. On-screen karaoke lyrics are displayed.
Dialogue and transition between karaoke songs.
The group performs the second song 'Kaiju no Hanauta'. Title and artist appear on screen.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
思い出すのは君の歌
会話よりも鮮明だ
どこに行ってしまったの
いつも探すんだよ
思い出すのは
君の歌
歌い笑う顔が鮮明だ
君に似合うんだよ
ずっと見ていたいよ
でも最後に見たいのは
きっともう君の夢の中
もう一度 また聞かせて
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
I remember your song
It's clearer than any conversation
Where have you gone?
I'm always looking for you
I remember
Your song

That suits you so well

But the last thing I want to see is
